Placebo_Before.description: Pre-treatment AFS scores for the placebo group. Used together with Placebo_After to compute change scores. These are scores from the same patients as Placebo_After.

Placebo_After.description: Post-treatment AFS scores for the placebo group. Used together with Placebo_Before to compute change scores. These are scores from the same patients as Placebo_Before.

Gestrinone_Before.description: Pre-treatment AFS scores for the gestrinone group. Used together with Gestrinone_After to compute change scores. These are scores from the same patients as Gestrinone_After.

Gestrinone_After.description: Post-treatment AFS scores for the gestrinone group. Used together with Gestrinone_Before to compute change scores. These are scores from the same patients as Gestrinone_Before.
